gratitude_paragraph: Thank you so much for the opportunity to participate in the Harborlight Urban Planning Fellowship this past fall. The twelve weeks I spent with your team profoundly shaped how I think about community-centered infrastructure design, and I am deeply grateful for the time, mentorship, and trust you extended to me throughout the program.
specific_appreciation: I particularly want to thank you for connecting me with the Eastside Greenway Coalition during my capstone project. The chance to work directly with neighborhood residents on the pedestrian corridor proposal gave me practical experience that no classroom could replicate. Your feedback on my final presentation — especially your suggestion to reframe the accessibility analysis around lived experience rather than compliance metrics — changed the direction of my work in a way I carry forward every day.
forward_looking: I have recently accepted a position as a transportation planner with the City of Portland, and I know that the foundation I built during the fellowship will serve me well in this new chapter. I would love to stay in touch and hope our paths cross again at the APA National Conference this September. If there is ever anything I can do to support the fellowship or its future cohorts, please do not hesitate to reach out.
